subcodes.title: Words spoken at House of Abbud in Akka, 1914-12-12
subcodes.first_line: When people invite me alone to their houses I ask them to prepare only one dish... I have carried in my mind for some time an educational system
subcodes.first_line_orig: یک ترتیبی از برای تربیت اطفال در ذهن من هست که هنوز اسبابش فراهم نشده که آن را مجری دارم
subcodes.subjects: @educational curricula, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir], @service to others; to the Cause of God, @education of children; moral education, @moderation; frugality; simplicity
